accurate.why: All claims are accurate and supported by the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; accurate description of what the resolution does and does not do.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states Congress disapproves the D.C. Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Disapproval resolutions do not amend federal statute; correctly notes this.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in the resolution.

effective_dates.why: States approval date of March 20, 2023, and congressional passage dates correctly.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative provision — disapproval of the D.C. act — accurately.

correct_entities.why: D.C. Council, Home Rule Act section 602(c)(1), D.C. Act 24-789 all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates (Jan. 17, Jan. 27, Feb. 9, Mar. 8, Mar. 20, 2023) match the bill text.
